name: Date A Live AU | The Spirit King
description:
You get reincarnated and become a Spirit, but not just any old spirit within Shido's group. You become the first male Spirit, the Spirit King. Like the reincarnated as Shido one, the only slight difference this time is. Instead of Origami becoming a Spirit it's Mana.

All characters will be aged up.

Also, before anyone says, where's the Spirit Queen? Well obviously that would be Mio/Reine. But put it this way think of Saber (Artoria Pendragon) From the Fate series. Her title is King not Queen.
creator: Blank_22
